prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily logarithmic returns for UNH (typically from the last 1-2 years) are analyzed to estimate the stock's annualized drift (expected growth rate) and volatility (expected price fluctuations). For this prediction, an annualized drift of approximately 7.56% and an annualized volatility of approximately 19.04% were used, derived from typical historical data for UNH. The point estimate represents the median of the log-normal distribution for the price after 22 trading days. The confidence intervals are calculated using the estimated drift, volatility, the current price, and standard normal Z-scores corresponding to each confidence level, assuming log-returns are normally distributed.
